explanation: This command uses insertion of quotes and preserves the original behavior. The command line is syntactically valid and mimics the structure of the true positives.

This command includes an additional parameter '-ExecutionPolicy Bypass' to simulate a realistic execution scenario while still matching the Sigma rule.
